title: Server Master
description: Your complete server management solution! From homes and warps, to auto-messagers and chat tools, this mod gives you everything you need for both single and multiplayer worlds.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e8e67890c71be2e728c92eea38eea1d5a7391c4_0.webp) Your complete server management solution! From homes and warps, to auto-messagers and chat tools, this mod gives you everything you need for both single and multiplayer worlds.
## 🚧 Current Status This mod is a **work in progress**, which means some features are not yet available. I'm actively developing and will be adding more content and improvements in future updates. You can find a list of available content below.
## ⚙️ Configuration All configuration files are saved in JSON format. You can find the documentation on how to set it up on the [Wiki Page](https://github.com/Maciej916/ServerMaster/wiki).
## 🌟 Features
### ✅ Welcome Message ![Welcom Message](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26a7f31e3ef2ef7481b78fb93dbcd73957b2fc45_0.webp) Customize the welcome message and sound that plays when players join the game.
### ✅ MOTD (Message of the Day) ![MOTD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/752c38d19245f9658e502a6d75cc3728ca7c05b3_0.webp) Customize the messages displayed to players when they join the server.
### ✅ Rules Command ![Rules](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2008679551f693484395befd3986fb5f64debf43_0.webp) Customize the rules that players see when using the `/rules` command.
### ✅ Auto Messenger ![Auto Messages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/653ab987354305bed02c672e82f6e6c27570d171_0.webp) Automatically sends messages in the chat at specified intervals.
### ✅ Customize Join and Leave Messages ![Customize Join and Leave Messages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd7b6f8a632b26fccbbb358f23eca5cafce149ed_0.webp) Set up custom messages that are displayed when players join or leave the server.
### ✅ Message Variables You can use variables within messages to dynamically display information.
### ✅ Custom Variables You can define custom variables to be used within your messages. These variables can be linked to actions like opening URLs or running commands.

![Footer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa85eb049e10497c7c627cf6277b60d9cffb88be_0.webp) Server Master is still in development, and I’d love to hear your feedback! If you find any bugs or have suggestions, please report them in the comments. Your input will help make the mod even better!
